economic_notes: Nation has business enterprises in Construction Services, Real Estate Services, Energy Services, and Retail Services. Retail Services had revenues of $10,116,842. Energy Services had net earnings of $2,427,229. First Nation guaranteed $13,454,742 of Nation business entity debt. Flying Dust is a member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (nine Nations organization).
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Six entities fully consolidated including Flying Dust Market Garden Ltd., Housing Corporation, Security Inc., CMHC Housing Program, and Community Development Fund. Nine GBEs accounted for by modified equity method including FDB Fuels, FDB Holding, FDB Gravel, Flying Dust Power Corporation, Flying Energy Oil & Gas LP, Flying Energy Inc., Snipe & Celly Pro Shop, 625706 Saskatchewan Ltd., and Flying Dust Flare Gas LP. ISC term loan of $960,673 interest-free related to 1932 Specific Claim. Flying Dust Treaty Land Entitlement Trust excluded from consolidation as controlled by independent trustees. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $14,265,835 + MLHSDA $2,195,975 + MLTC CFS $840,802 + MLTC PS $787578 + CMHC $414,510 + FNLMR $77,053 + Province of SK $8,146 + NW School Division $571,302 + MLTC RDI $1,117,222 + Government of Canada $1,250 = $20,279,673; osr = total revenue minus government transfers.
